hyperedges.summary: Current documentation frames the system as dry-run-first with separate explicit gates for live orders, read-only broker verification, Gist upload, and local-only dashboard exposure.
Review findings cluster around corrupted bar/volume/session data, directly threatening documented SMA20, volume, reversal, and lookback semantics.
Review findings cluster around local state diverging from broker truth or process reality.
Documentation drift spans path/context, runtime architecture, configuration ownership, dashboard auth, dependency list, launch syntax, and safety parameter coverage.

nodes.label: QQQ 0DTE Trading System
nodes.summary: Runnable QQQ 0DTE options trading system described by README.md and SKILL.md, with dry-run-first live quote operation and optional real Longbridge order submission.

nodes.label: qqq_strategy.py
nodes.summary: Pure signal, option-symbol, sizing, and exit logic.

nodes.label: live_trader.py
nodes.summary: Polling engine for signal detection, broker routing, state writing, order records, and runtime safety gates.

nodes.label: longbridge_client.py
nodes.summary: Longbridge SDK integration for quote and order interactions.

nodes.label: trader_web.py
nodes.summary: Flask dashboard and JSON APIs for local runtime state, trade records, and order diagnostics.

nodes.label: skill_check.py
nodes.summary: Safe end-to-end capability smoke check covering packages, compile checks, dry-run state writing, read-only Longbridge checks, notification formatting, and safety guard reporting.

nodes.label: longbridge_cli_check.py
nodes.summary: Read-only Longbridge CLI verification for auth, quotes, positions, and portfolio health.

nodes.label: watchdog.py
nodes.summary: Simple restart loop for live_trader.py with argument passthrough after --.

nodes.label: update_gist.py
nodes.summary: Record publisher that is dry-run by default and requires explicit confirmation for real upload.

nodes.label: backtest_v6.py
nodes.summary: CSV signal backtest harness used to evaluate strategy parameter evolution.

nodes.label: trading_config.py
nodes.summary: Centralized runtime configuration source according to current README/review context.

nodes.label: state.json
nodes.summary: Generated runtime state snapshot consumed by dashboard and diagnostics.

nodes.label: today.csv
nodes.summary: Generated intraday bar data file used by the engine and diagnostics.

nodes.label: records/*.json
nodes.summary: Generated daily trade records consumed by dashboard and publisher.

nodes.label: .live_trader.lock
nodes.summary: Generated single-instance lock intended to prevent duplicate engines from writing shared state or submitting duplicate signals.

nodes.label: Triple live-order gate
nodes.summary: Real order submission requires QQQ_LIVE_TRADING=1, --live, and --submit-live-orders; otherwise live quote mode remains dry-submit.

nodes.label: Read-only Longbridge verification
nodes.summary: longbridge_cli_check.py and skill_check.py use read-only broker checks and do not submit orders.

nodes.label: Explicit Gist upload gate
nodes.summary: update_gist.py remains dry-run unless credentials and --confirm-upload are supplied.

nodes.label: Dashboard localhost binding
nodes.summary: Dashboard should stay bound to 127.0.0.1 because local JSON endpoints expose runtime state and trade records.

nodes.label: Longbridge order authority
nodes.summary: Real-order records should treat Longbridge order id, detail status, executed quantity, and executed price as authoritative over local quote fallback.

nodes.label: v6.1 dual-signal strategy
nodes.summary: Breakout continuation plus exhaustion reversal for QQQ 0DTE options, using SMA20, volume, momentum, body, gap, entry window, and dynamic take-profit filters.

nodes.label: v6 backtest result
nodes.summary: references/backtest-results.md reports 761 trades over 2.3 years, 75.8% win rate, +3111.31% total return, 25.19% max drawdown, and 76% take-profit exits.

nodes.label: today.csv cross-day pollution
nodes.summary: Hermes review says old bars from 4/28-5/6 can accumulate together, polluting SMA20, volume, and reversal calculations.

nodes.label: Position written before fill confirmation
nodes.summary: Hermes review says local position is written after submit without waiting for actual fill, causing inflated local position and incorrect PnL on partial fill or reject.

nodes.label: BarBuilder uses cumulative volume
nodes.summary: Hermes review says Longbridge quote volume is daily cumulative, so using it directly breaks the volume filter.

nodes.label: running state not cleared on crash
nodes.summary: Hermes review says only KeyboardInterrupt is handled, so other exceptions can leave running=true and stale runtime state.
nodes.norm_label: running state not cleared on crash

nodes.label: Stale state and lock residue
nodes.summary: Hermes review says dead PID lock and state.json running=true can make the next startup misjudge engine state.

nodes.label: Premarket bars affect strategy
nodes.summary: Hermes review says premarket bars in today.csv can distort SMA and reversal calculations.

nodes.label: Order detail fetched only once
nodes.summary: Hermes review says delayed or rejected orders may never receive true executed price if order_detail is queried only once.

nodes.label: BarBuilder skips no-tick minutes
nodes.summary: Hermes review says irregular bars make lookback semantics drift from fixed one-minute windows.

nodes.label: watchdog restarts normal exit
nodes.summary: Hermes review says watchdog can restart even after normal --once exit 0.

nodes.label: Backtest and live mismatch
nodes.summary: Hermes review says backtest does not enforce entry window, daily loss, and end-day close in the same way as live.

nodes.label: SKILL.md placeholder project path
nodes.summary: SKILL.md uses cd /path/to/QQQ_Live, which is not the current repository path.

nodes.label: SKILL.md PushCandlestick mismatch
nodes.summary: SKILL.md discusses PushCandlestick callbacks, while current README describes active polling and real quote probing.

nodes.label: SKILL.md CONFIG sync mismatch
nodes.summary: SKILL.md and references/config.md say live_trader.py and trader_web.py CONFIG must be edited together, while current review context says configuration has been centralized to trading_config.py.

nodes.label: deployment.md dashboard token mismatch
nodes.summary: deployment.md instructs setting API_TOKEN and using token auth, while README says local dashboard does not require a token.

nodes.label: deployment.md nohup syntax stale
nodes.summary: Hermes review flags deployment.md nohup syntax as outdated.

nodes.label: numpy/scipy dependency drift
nodes.summary: SKILL.md and deployment.md list numpy/scipy, while review says code no longer uses them.

nodes.label: config.md missing safety parameters
nodes.summary: Hermes review says references/config.md omits max_option_price, max_contracts, and max_hold_bars.

nodes.label: README Windows set syntax
nodes.summary: README uses Windows set examples even though deployment docs recommend Linux/WSL.

nodes.label: Dead config entries
nodes.summary: Hermes review says tp, trail_activate, and trail_drop are dead config.

links.evidence: README.md Files and SKILL.md file list identify live_trader.py as the core engine.
README.md and SKILL.md identify trader_web.py as the Flask dashboard.
README.md describes skill_check.py as the safe end-to-end smoke check.
SKILL.md uses /path/to/QQQ_Live while current task path is /Users/tablo/.codex/worktrees/0c6c/sleeping-qqq-0d-trading.
SKILL.md/deployment.md list numpy and scipy, while hermes-review.md says code does not use them.
README.md examples use set QQQ_LIVE_TRADING=1; deployment.md recommends Linux/WSL and says Windows native is not recommended.
README.md Live Mode and SKILL.md architecture say live_trader.py writes state.json.
README.md Live Mode and SKILL.md architecture say live_trader.py writes today.csv.
README.md Files and SKILL.md architecture say live_trader.py writes records/*.json.
README.md and deployment.md describe watchdog.py as restart loop for live_trader.py.
README.md says real orders require QQQ_LIVE_TRADING=1, --live, and --submit-live-orders.
README.md Real Mode says Longbridge order id/status/detail snapshots are authoritative and local quote fallback is diagnostic.
hermes-review.md locates BarBuilder cumulative volume issue in live_trader.py.
hermes-review.md locates submit/write-position issue in live_trader.py.
SKILL.md documents PushCandlestick callback pitfalls, while README.md describes active polling and --once quote probe behavior.
hermes-review.md locates single order-detail fetch in longbridge_client.py.
SKILL.md architecture shows trader_web.py reads state.json.
SKILL.md architecture shows trader_web.py reads records/*.json.
README.md warns to keep dashboard bound to 127.0.0.1 because JSON endpoints expose state and records.
README.md says skill_check.py never submits live orders and reports safety contract fields.
README.md Longbridge CLI Verification says it runs only read-only CLI commands and does not submit orders.
hermes-review.md locates normal-exit restart behavior in watchdog.py.
deployment.md presents old nohup/manual start guidance; README.md emphasizes watchdog passthrough for safe smoke tests and hermes-review.md flags nohup syntax as outdated.
README.md Files describes update_gist.py as record publisher; SKILL.md says Gist sync reads records.
README.md Safe Finalization Checklist says real upload requires credentials and explicit --confirm-upload.
README.md identifies backtest_v6.py as CSV signal backtest harness; references/backtest-results.md stores reported results.
hermes-review.md says backtest_v6.py does not enforce entry window, daily loss, or end-day close consistently with live.
SKILL.md and config.md say two CONFIG copies must stay in sync; hermes-review.md says configuration has been centralized to trading_config.py.
hermes-review.md says tp, trail_activate, and trail_drop are dead config; config.md still documents tp/trail parameters.
hermes-review.md says non-KeyboardInterrupt crashes can leave running=true.
hermes-review.md says state can still show running:true after stale lock/dead process.
hermes-review.md critical finding says today.csv accumulates multiple days and pollutes SMA20/volume/reversal.
hermes-review.md warning says today.csv contains an 08:07 bar that can affect strategy computation.
hermes-review.md says dead PID lock residue can remain.
hermes-review.md says config.md lacks max_option_price/max_contracts/max_hold_bars; README.md live commands use max-option-price and contract caps as safety controls.
deployment.md instructs API_TOKEN/token access, while README.md says dashboard local mode does not require a token and should remain bound to 127.0.0.1.
hermes-review.md says local position is written before fill confirmation; README says real order status and executed fields are Longbridge-owned.
A one-shot detail fetch can miss true executed price/status, undermining Longbridge-owned order facts described in README.md.
references/backtest-results.md reports v6/v6.1 strategy evolution and final v6 vol_mult=0.8 metrics.
The reviewed pollution affects SMA20, volume, and reversal inputs used by the documented strategy filters.
hermes-review.md says cumulative Longbridge quote volume makes volume filter logic fail; strategy docs emphasize volume confirmation.
hermes-review.md says skipped no-tick minutes create irregular bars; references/backtest-results.md and SKILL.md define lookback as five one-minute bars.
If live/backtest rules differ, reported references/backtest-results.md metrics may not represent live behavior.

hyperedges.summary: Current documentation frames the system as dry-run-first with separate explicit gates for live orders, read-only broker verification, Gist upload, and local-only dashboard exposure.
Review findings cluster around corrupted bar/volume/session data, directly threatening documented SMA20, volume, reversal, and lookback semantics.
Review findings cluster around local state diverging from broker truth or process reality.
Documentation drift spans path/context, runtime architecture, configuration ownership, dashboard auth, dependency list, launch syntax, and safety parameter coverage.
